prompt_text:
### Demographics: 71-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 17 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Body mass index category: Normal
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Glimepiride 4mg twice daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 53.8 kg; Height 157.4 cm; BMI 21.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 111/73 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.2%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 6.9%; 3 months ago 6.3%; current 6.0%), FPG (12 months ago 188mg/dL; 9 months ago 172mg/dL; 6 months ago 156mg/dL; 3 months ago 138mg/dL; current 126mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 52.9kg; 9 months ago 52.8kg; 6 months ago 51.7kg; 3 months ago 51.8kg; current 53.8kg), Height (12 months ago 157.4cm; 9 months ago 157.4cm; 6 months ago 157.4cm; 3 months ago 157.4cm; current 157.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 21.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 111mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 70mmHg; 9 months ago 70mmHg; 6 months ago 73mmHg; 3 months ago 71mmHg; current 73mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 31U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 28U/L; current 27U/L), AST (12 months ago 27U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 23U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 95mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 98mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 98mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 94mL/min/1.73m²; current 63mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 42mg/g; 9 months ago 58mg/g; 6 months ago 56mg/g; 3 months ago 57mg/g; current 30mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 92mg/dL; 6 months ago 88mg/dL; 3 months ago 93mg/dL; current 90mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 55mg/dL; 6 months ago 55mg/dL; 3 months ago 56mg/dL; current 54mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 106mg/dL; 9 months ago 125mg/dL; 6 months ago 123mg/dL; 3 months ago 125mg/dL; current 114mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.2g/dL; 9 months ago 11.8g/dL; 6 months ago 11.7g/dL; 3 months ago 11.6g/dL; current 11.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.73 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
